Take caution with contrast dye procedures", "dosage": "Usually 500-2550mg daily in divided doses", "warning": "Not for Type 1 diabetes or serious kidney disease. Monitor kidney function regularly."}

{"medicine": "Lisinopril", "uses": "High blood pressure and heart failure", "side_effects": "Dizziness, dry cough, headache, fatigue", "interactions": "NSAIDs may reduce effectiveness. Potassium supplements increase hyperkalemia risk", "dosage": "Usually 10mg once daily, adjusted 10-40mg based on response", "warning": "Can cause dangerous hyperkalemia. {"medicine": "Aspirin", "uses": "Heart attack/stroke prevention, pain relief, inflammation", "side_effects": "Stomach upset, bleeding risk, easy bruising, acid reflux", "interactions": "Increases bleeding risk with warfarin and other anticoagulants. Careful with other drugs metabolized by CYP3A4", "dosage": "Usually 10-80mg daily in evening", "warning": "Can cause muscle breakdown (rhabdomyolysis). Monitor liver function and muscle symptoms.
